name: Splatline
desc: Convert 2D videos and photos into interactive 3D scenes using Gaussian splatting backends (VGGT, LongSplat, DepthSplat, SHARP, TripoSplat), Rerun, and the Supe…
descFull: Convert 2D videos and photos into interactive 3D scenes using Gaussian splatting backends (VGGT, LongSplat, DepthSplat, SHARP, TripoSplat), Rerun, and the SuperSplat editor.
